images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model exuding a 90s retro film vibe, perched gracefully on a sofa by a expansive floor-to-ceiling window. She is draped in a form-fitting leather biker jacket draped loosely over her bare shoulders, revealing her delicate collarbones and ample chest, paired with denim shorts that accentuate her long, slender legs. The shot is a dynamic bottom-up perspective from the shoe view, capturing her as she takes a mirror selfie with her smartphone, her eyes closed in serene enjoyment of a gentle breeze. Bathed in bright, cinematic studio lighting that casts a soft, ethereal glow, her skin texture appears flawless with visible pores. The background is a beautifully blurred modern apartment interior with bokeh effects, rendered in a rich sepia vintage tone. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, featuring depth of field, ray tracing, and global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
